title: agrostis pilosula var. ciliata
intro: Agrostis pilosula var. ciliata, also known as hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various digestive issues, including diarrhea and constipation, due to its ability to regulate bowel movements and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Agrostis pilosula var. ciliata include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, it can be used as a tea or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects and provide relief from digestive issues and other health concerns.
